recommendations.title: Who Can Kill a Child?
recommendations.overview: A couple of English tourists arrive at the island of Almanzora, off the Spanish Mediterranean coast, where they discover that there are no adults in a small fishing village, only some children who stare at them and smile mysteriously.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: Images
recommendations.overview: While holidaying in Ireland, a pregnant children's author finds her mental state becoming increasingly unstable, resulting in paranoia, hallucinations, and visions of a doppelgänger.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Strange but True
recommendations.overview: A woman surprises the family of her deceased boyfriend by telling them she's pregnant with his child.

recommendations.title: After
recommendations.overview: When two bus crash survivors awake to discover that they are the only people left in their small town, they must form an unlikely alliance in a race to unravel the truth behind their isolation. As strange events begin to unfold, they start to questio

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Survive Style 5+
recommendations.overview: Five bizarre stories with no apparent connection to one another eventually become intertwined, resulting in surreal circumstances.

recommendations.title: Snatchers
recommendations.overview: After status-obsessed teen Sara has sex for the first time, she wakes up the next day nine months pregnant-with an alien.

recommendations.title: Robot Riot
recommendations.overview: Unconscious soldiers are dropped into a testing site only to discover their memories have been wiped and that once docile machines are the new intelligence.
